data.body:
Third review BLOCK remediation:
- Established precedence: pin collection runs before prerequisite LLM evaluation; unreadable/unresolvable targets stop the review, while indeterminate is only for readable pinned targets whose evaluation/attribution fails.
- Assigned full relationship/fingerprint re-collection to the pin story under the store write lock immediately before signing; any set or fingerprint difference aborts.
- Renamed reducer state to plan_review_phase to avoid the prompt execution_mode collision.
- Defined idempotent bootstrap for pre-feature snapshots: open/idea -> planning, other compiled statuses -> execution, applied through a reducer-cache version bump.
- Kept execution-phase review always active as previously approved; it only affects an explicitly requested re-review and existing planning attestations remain acceptable. No third project flag was added.
- Added criterion -> phase dependency, isolated specialized prerequisite prompts, old-reader compatibility coverage, and reduced parent ACs below the oversize threshold.
Rerunning epic review before any child review.
